ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was released */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors involved in the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital object identifier for each publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was released */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the journal where the publication was released */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the journal where the publication was released */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stem_cell_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stem cell source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the stem cell source */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cells used as the stem cell source */,
  "tissue_origin" TEXT /* Tissue from which the stem cells were derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reprogramming_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reprogramming method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the reprogramming method */,
  "reprogramming_factors" TEXT /* Specific factors used for reprogramming */,
  "reprogramming_protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol used for reprogramming */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media */,
  "media_description" TEXT /* Description of the media used for stem cell culture */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media used */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor from which the media was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "culture_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each culture system */,
  "system_description" TEXT /* Description of the culture system used */,
  "system_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor from which the culture system was obtained */,
  "system_model" TEXT /* Model number of the culture system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efficiency_metrics" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency metric */,
  "efficiency_range" TEXT /* Description of the efficiency range achieved */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of efficiency metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the efficiency metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the experiment */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stem cell source used */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reprogramming method applied */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media used */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the culture system employed */,
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the efficiency metric recorded */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "num_cells_used" INTEGER /* Number of cells used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES culture_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES stem_cell_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_efficiency_id FOREIGN KEY ("efficiency_id") REFERENCES efficiency_metrics ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES reprogramming_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user is affiliated */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the experiment data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
